2026-0395
2026-04-29ESDCDepartment of Employment and Social Development ActReappointment of a part-time member of the Social Security Tribunal who may hear matters in the Employment Insurance SectionReappointment of Lilian Ruth Klein of Thornhill, Ontario, as a part-time member of the Social Security Tribunal who may hear matters in the Employment Insurance Section, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of two years, effective July 3, 2026.N/A
act: Department of Employment and Social Development Act
subject: Reappointment of a part-time member of the Social Security Tribunal who may hear matters in the Employment Insurance Section
precis: Reappointment of Lilian Ruth Klein of Thornhill, Ontario, as a part-time member of the Social Security Tribunal who may hear matters in the Employment Insurance Section, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of two years, effective July 3, 2026.
